non_scope: No production deployment activation, protected value access, module frontend implementation outside approved screen contracts, predictive stop analysis, autonomous readiness, execution prompt creation, ticket execution, runtime code edit by this planning task, Prisma migration edit by this planning task, package change, or Spark Genesis repository change.
expected_outputs: Level 5 validation gate implementation result or decision artifact
validation_ladder: local startup health smoke verification for the affected service surface after exact-file planning
stop_conditions: Stop if exact-file plan reveals work requires files_forbidden_to_change.
Stop if the ticket cannot be completed without making an architectural decision not present in any committed source document.
Stop if validation fails after 3 bounded repair attempts.
Stop if work drifts into runtime / Foundry / module installer / business modules / production auth / deployment / secrets / destructive migrations without explicit ticket authority.
Stop if a Prisma schema migration is required but not authorized in files_expected_to_change.
ticket_quality_notes: Implementation is not stale by itself. Tickets become stale.
Apply maximum concrete capability within the approved scope of each ticket.
